name: Win-Back
description: Offer a unique per-contact discount code to recently-cancelled subscribers via email + SMS.

args.subject: Win-Back agent initiated
args.body: Created unique coupon code {{coupon.code}} — valid for 14 days.

args.subject: A small thank-you, whenever you're ready — 20% off at Bright Smile
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We saw your subscription with Bright Smile Dental ended — totally okay, life moves and so do priorities. No guilt-trip here.

If you ever want to come back for a cleaning or a no-pressure check-in, here's 20% off on us:

{{coupon.code}}

It's good for 14 days at checkout. Our door's open whenever — free new-patient consults, painless cleanings, and a team that genuinely wants dental care to feel less scary.

If something specific didn't work for you, I'd love to hear it — just hit reply. A real person reads every one.

Warmly,
The Bright Smile Dental team
Hey {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — your 20% off code {{coupon.code}} is still good for a few more days if you'd like to come back. No pressure either way!

args.subject: Win-Back agent sequence complete
args.body: Delivered email + SMS with coupon {{coupon.code}}. Redemption (if any) will surface as a payment event on the workspace's Stripe Connect account.
